summary: Iteration 14: Comprehensive Pre-Demo QA for Abundant Church - ALL 30 backend tests PASSED (100%). Full UI testing completed - all account types login correctly, all navigation works, all pages load with proper data.

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_qa_demo_iter14.py - Comprehensive QA test suite with all login flows and API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-demo QA complete. All account types work, all navigation items work, all pages load with proper mock data. Platform GMV shows $137,218 MTD. Charles Nieman content visible in Watch page. 8 Abundant Pathways courses available. Merch store with 9 products. Cafe with 7 items. Groups page shows 8 groups. Events page shows upcoming events with registration counts. Solomon AI chat works with voice input. Signup flow works with church selector.
